title: The next evolution of the Agents SDK
summary: OpenAI updates the Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness, helping developers build secure, long-running agents across files and tools.

title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.

title: Using custom GPTs
summary: Learn how to build and use custom GPTs to automate workflows, maintain consistent outputs, and create purpose-built AI assistants.

title: The next phase of enterprise AI
summary: OpenAI outlines the next phase of enterprise AI, as adoption accelerates across industries with Frontier, ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex, and company-wide AI agents.

title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
summary: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.

title: Workspace agents
summary: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.

title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
summary: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.

title: Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
summary: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.
